productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Pink Ballerinas Shoe
description: A perfect wear for ballet dancers, these ballerina shoes are ergonomically designed to provide ample comfort to the feet. Wear them while you dance to your joy, or simply team them with casual wear for that cool look.Upper Leather upper for durability and comfort Open toe box with a forefoot bow for style and comfort gathered sockliner hem for style Midsole PU midsole for durability and comfort Outsole Cupped outsole for comfort when dancing TPU outsole for durability and comfort shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
